system.flavor: Your sword stroke is so fast you can slash the air multiple times in a blink, sending out cutting shockwaves.
system.effect:
Attack: 4 damage. Hit: +1d6.
Area effect: 2 damage.
Effect [X]: You may target one, (4+) two, (6) three additional cross 1 in range, extending the area effect. The areas cannot overlap.
Excel targets are slashed with an aftershock, taking 2 damage again.
Critical Hit the excel effect.
